seoBlock.title: AI Music Generator for Creators
seoBlock.p1: Calyra AI is an AI song generator and AI music generator designed to help creators turn prompts, lyrics, and song ideas into complete tracks. Instead of starting from a blank music project, you can describe the sound you want, choose a style, and generate music with vocals and instruments. Use Calyra AI as an AI song maker when you have a simple idea, a text to song AI tool when you want to describe a mood, or a lyrics to song AI workflow when you already have words.
seoBlock.p2: Popular use cases include AI rap songs, anime openings, phonk tracks, lo-fi background music, EDM drops, emotional piano ballads, and pop songs for social content. Creators can make AI songs for YouTube videos, TikTok, Shorts, podcasts, games, ads, and personal creative projects. Subscribers can download generated songs and use them commercially, subject to our terms.

faq.title: Questions Before You Generate
faq.q1: What is an AI song maker?
faq.a1: An AI Song Maker helps you create songs from ideas, lyrics, prompts, and music styles. Calyra AI turns your input into structured lyrics and song direction so you can move from a simple idea to an AI-generated song.
faq.q2: Is Calyra AI a free AI music generator?
faq.a2: Calyra AI may offer free or trial access when available, so you can test song ideas before upgrading. Paid plans unlock more generation, download, and commercial-use options.
faq.q3: Can I use AI-generated songs commercially?
faq.a3: Paid users can download AI-generated songs and use them commercially for creator projects, business content, and distribution, subject to our terms.
faq.q4: What is the difference between Text to Song and Lyrics to Song?
faq.a4: Text to Song starts from an idea, prompt, mood, or story. Lyrics to Song starts from lyrics you already have, then helps shape them into a song with style and arrangement direction.
faq.q5: Can I make songs with vocals?
faq.a5: Yes. You can generate songs with vocals and instruments depending on the selected mode, prompt, and music style.
faq.q6: Can I create AI music for YouTube and TikTok?
faq.a6: Yes. You can create AI music for YouTube, AI music for TikTok, podcasts, short videos, social media, and other creator projects.
faq.q7: Is Calyra AI an AI song maker or an AI music generator?
faq.a7: Calyra AI can be described as both an AI Song Maker and an AI music generator because it helps you create complete songs from text, lyrics, and styles.

one.answer: Yes. Paste your lyrics and add style direction so Calyra AI can generate a song with vocals and instruments.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How many credits does song generation cost? Is it worth it?
faq.a1: Each song costs 100 credits. Some models return 2 versions in one generation, which costs 200 credits and makes it easier to compare versions and pick the best result faster.
faq.q2: Is payment secure? I'm worried about payment risk.
faq.a2: Yes, absolutely. We use mainstream payment channels with bank-level encryption and risk controls. Your payment details are processed directly by the payment platform, and we cannot view or store your full payment information.
faq.q3: How does subscription billing work? Will I forget renewals?
faq.a3: We offer two plans: Basic and Pro, with both monthly and yearly billing. Monthly plans renew automatically every month, yearly plans renew automatically every year, and the first charge starts on your purchase date.
faq.q4: What copyright/commercial rights do I get after subscribing?
faq.a4: Subscribers can download all generated songs and receive full commercial usage rights, including use for content publishing, commercial projects, and music platform distribution.
faq.q5: How many free generations do free users get each day?
faq.a5: You get 1-2 free generations every 24 hours, which can produce 2-4 songs. This uses a rolling window: once your free uses are consumed, the next reset is calculated from that exact time.
faq.q6: How long are songs stored? Will they be deleted?
faq.a6: Current policy: free users' songs are stored for 30 days. Songs generated during an active Basic or Pro subscription are kept long-term. If you need long-term catalog retention, a higher tier is recommended.

common.contactBody: For questions about these policies or your account, contact support at support@calyraai.com or through your dashboard support channel.

seo.title: Privacy Policy | Calyra AI
seo.description: How Calyra AI collects, uses, and protects personal data for account, payment, and AI song creation workflows.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: This policy explains what data Calyra AI handles, why we handle it, and the choices you have.

sections.title: Data we collect
body: We collect account identifiers such as email and authentication data, song creation inputs such as stories and prompts, generation outputs such as lyrics and audio metadata, and billing records needed to process purchases.
bullets: Account data: email, auth provider identifiers, profile basics
Creation data: story text, style selections, generated lyrics/audio references
Usage data: logs, device/browser metadata, anti-abuse signals
Billing data: transaction references from payment processors

sections.title: How we use data
body: We use data to operate core product flows, deliver purchased services, prevent abuse, improve reliability, and communicate important account or policy updates.
bullets: Run lyric, audio, and report generation workflows
Store and serve your songs and public share pages
Process credits, subscriptions, and refunds
Investigate incidents and maintain security

sections.title: Third-party services
body: Calyra AI relies on selected infrastructure and model providers to deliver the service. These providers process only the data required for their function under applicable agreements.
bullets: Hosting and database services
Payment processing services
Email and notification services
AI generation providers for lyrics, audio, and analysis

sections.title: Retention and your choices
body: We retain data for as long as needed to provide the service, meet legal obligations, and resolve disputes. You can request deletion of your account data subject to operational and legal constraints.
bullets: You may delete songs and account data from product surfaces where available
Backups and legal records may persist for limited periods
Public song pages remain public until you change visibility or remove them

seo.title: Terms of Service | Calyra AI
seo.description: Terms governing use of Calyra AI, including account responsibilities, generated content, credits, subscriptions, and limitations.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: By using Calyra AI, you agree to these terms for account access, AI generation, and paid features.

sections.title: Service scope
body: Calyra AI provides tools to transform user prompts into lyrics, audio, and creator-style reports. Features can change over time and may vary by plan or region.

sections.title: Accounts and acceptable use
body: You are responsible for activity under your account and for complying with law and platform policies.
bullets: Do not misuse the service, attempt unauthorized access, or automate abuse
Do not upload unlawful, infringing, or harmful content
Keep account credentials secure and accurate

sections.title: Content and intellectual property
body: You retain rights to the inputs you submit. Subject to applicable law and these terms, you may use outputs generated for your account. Calyra AI and its licensors retain rights in the platform, models, and infrastructure.

sections.title: Payments, credits, and refunds
body: Paid features include credit packs and subscriptions. Charges are processed by our payment providers. Refund eligibility is governed by our Refund Policy.
bullets: Credits are consumed by eligible generation actions
Subscription access and benefits follow the active billing period
Refund requests are reviewed under stated policy conditions

sections.title: Disclaimers and limitation
body: The service is provided on an as-available basis. We do not guarantee uninterrupted operation or specific creative outcomes. To the maximum extent permitted by law, liability is limited to amounts paid for the relevant service period.

seo.title: Refund Policy | Calyra AI
seo.description: Refund eligibility, timelines, and process for Calyra AI credit purchases and subscriptions.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: This policy explains when refunds are available and how to request one.

sections.title: Eligibility
body: Refunds are available for unused credits requested within 7 days of purchase.
bullets: Request must be submitted within 7 calendar days
Credits tied to the request must be unused
The purchase must be made through an official Calyra AI checkout flow

sections.title: Non-refundable cases
body: Refunds are generally not available for credits that have been used, expired windows, or abuse-related account restrictions.
bullets: Partially or fully consumed credits
Requests beyond the 7-day window
Fraud, chargeback abuse, or policy violations

sections.title: How to request a refund
body: Contact support with your account email, order identifier, and reason for the request. We may ask for additional verification to protect account security.
bullets: Include order ID and purchase date
Use the same account email used for purchase
Allow support time to verify credit usage status

sections.title: Processing timeline
body: Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method. Processing time depends on your payment provider and card network.
bullets: Policy review: typically within 3 business days
Payment reversal: usually 5-10 business days after approval

seo.title: About Calyra AI - AI Music Creation From Personal Stories
seo.description: Learn how Calyra AI turns personal stories into AI-generated lyrics, audio, producer-style reports, and shareable song pages.

about.title: An AI music creation platform built around personal stories
about.subtitle: Calyra AI helps people turn emotions, memories, and messages into lyrics, audio, and shareable song pages. The product is designed for creators who want a complete song workflow without starting from a blank studio session.

pillars.title: Story-first songwriting
pillars.description: Calyra AI starts with the user's real memory, mood, or message, then turns it into structured lyrics with a clear emotional arc.

pillars.title: Audio generation workflow
pillars.description: After the lyric draft is ready, the platform generates playable AI audio and saves the result to a public song page.

pillars.title: Producer-style feedback
pillars.description: Reports help creators understand emotional value, hook strength, market positioning, and next steps for a song.

about.whyTitle: Creative tools should make the next step obvious
whyBody: Many AI music tools stop at generation. Calyra AI connects the full path: capture the story, shape the lyric, generate audio, evaluate the result, and publish a page that listeners and search engines can understand.
The platform is intentionally practical. It shows generation status, credit impact, public links, reports, and storage behavior so creators can keep moving instead of guessing what happened.
Public song pages are built to include the audio, lyrics, song details, and related music in indexable HTML, helping each finished song become a useful share asset rather than a hidden file.
about.trustTitle: Clear credits, private account pages, and public songs only when a creator chooses to publish
about.trustBody: Account pages are protected by Supabase authentication. Sensitive provider keys stay server-side, and payment flows are handled through Creem checkout and customer portal routes.
